token.description: **Prebid.js**: please fill 'pangle' by default. **Prebid Server**: access token, please contact Pangle team to get your token

appid.description: **(Required for Prebid.js)** The app id on Pangle platform, please get them from the platform or contact Pangle team

placementid.description: **(Required for Prebid.js)** The placement id created on Pangle platform, please get them from the platform or contact Pangle team

test.description: For testing, please set it to '1' so that you can test the integration. Pangle strongly recommends testing before going live.
